hooks.command:
CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git push' || exit 0; cat <<'HOOKEOF'
{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"IMPORTANT PRE-PUSH REVIEW: Before pushing, review the full diff against the base branch. Run git diff main...HEAD (or the appropriate base) and check for:
1. Accessibility: missing aria-expanded, aria-label, or role attributes on interactive elements
2. Pluralization: labels like '1 warnings' instead of '1 warning'
3. Code quality: IIFE patterns in JSX that should be hoisted to component body, unused imports, dead code
4. Tests: new functionality without corresponding test coverage
5. Console logs or debug statements left in
If you find issues, fix them and commit before pushing. If everything looks clean, proceed with the push."}}
HOOKEOF
